---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Who has it? (Don't lead with the solution.)

## Proposed direction

Roughly what you have in mind. Keep it open — design happens in discussion.

## Why now

Why this matters now versus later.

## Scope check

- [ ] This aligns with the [personas & non-goals](../../product/personas.md)
- [ ] This is a **major** change (new feature/module, schema, dependency,
      public API, design system) and will need an [RFC](../../product/rfc)
